card.intuition: At every position, ask: is my current running sum better off extended, or should I start fresh here? Keep a global maximum as you go.
card.analogy: Walking a path with hills and valleys, collecting coins — you keep your running total but restart whenever your accumulated debt (negative sum) makes starting over more profitable.
when_to_use: Maximum sum contiguous subarray in a 1D array
Maximum sum subgrid in a 2D matrix (run Kadane on each column-compressed row range)
Circular maximum subarray (compare normal Kadane with total_sum − min_subarray_sum)
Any problem reducible to: 'best contiguous substructure ending at position i'
gotchas: Initialize cur_sum and max_sum to nums[0], not 0 — an all-negative array should return the least-negative element, not 0
The recurrence is cur_sum = max(num, cur_sum + num) — don't add num after taking the max
Kadane's gives the sum, not the indices — to recover the subarray, track lo/hi pointers separately

exercise.prompt: Complete Kadane's algorithm to find the maximum sum of any contiguous subarray.
exercise.starter_code:
def max_subarray(nums):
    # Initialize to first element, not 0, to handle all-negative arrays
    cur_sum = nums[0]
    max_sum = nums[0]
    for num in nums[1:]:
        # Extend current subarray or start a new one here
        cur_sum = ___________
        max_sum = ___________
    return max_sum
exercise.solution:
cur_sum = max(num, cur_sum + num)
max_sum = max(max_sum, cur_sum)
hints: cur_sum at position i is either: start fresh with just num, OR extend the previous subarray: cur_sum + num. Take the max.
After updating cur_sum, update max_sum if cur_sum beats the global best seen so far
exercise.test_code:
assert max_subarray([-2,1,-3,4,-1,2,1,-5,4]) == 6,   'Classic: [4,-1,2,1] = 6'
assert max_subarray([1])                          == 1,   'Single element'
assert max_subarray([-1,-2,-3])                   == -1,  'All negative: return max element'
assert max_subarray([5,4,-1,7,8])                 == 23,  'Whole array is optimal'
assert max_subarray([-2,-1])                      == -1,  'Pick least negative'
print('PASS')
